verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I see a world that's judged I see a dying world I see the need for the Word to be manifest A Way is open unto us An entrance into another World An evolution from the dust To the stars above Give quickening power By the hearing of the Word

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I Feel the pull inside Of my celestial home The deep in me is drawing me To that eternal place

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: There is a cry for revelation A need to know as We were always known For it won't be long again You can see we are at the end Slack not your riding Continue to sigh and cry You must have that Token To take that heavenly flight

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Though we've grieved by various trials That the genuineness Of our faith may be tried For at the end of our Faith We'll received salvation for our Souls A glorious body, a Son In the image of the Word United with Theophany We'll be one with the living God

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I see a world that's judged And nowhere to run And nowhere to hide Our only escape is the faith inside
